titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 595

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=922 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:47:55.622636+00 | translation moa=923 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:47:55.632005+00

p.cl:
W . dei gracia Rex Scott’ . Episcopis . Abbatibus . Comitibus . Baronibus . Iusticiis . Vicecomitibus . Ministris et Omnibus probis
hominibus tocius terre sue . salutem .

Sciant presentes et futuri me concessisse et Hac Carta mea confirmasse . Diui
sas inter Coldinghamsire . et Bonekillesire . Tenend’ ita libere et quiete plenarie et honorifice . Sicut Carta
Regis Dauid . aui mei testatur et Confirmat . scilicet a Midlesdene heued per Mereburnes heued . uersus Occiden
tem usque ad Crhac hoctrestrete . et Inde per Eandem stratam usque ad Eiford .

Testibus his . Watero
de Bidun Cancellario . Comite . Waldeuo . Ricardo de Moreuilla constabulario . Roberto de Quinci . Waltero de Winlesor’ .
Waltero Camerario . philippo de Valloniis . Willelmo de Veteri ponte . Iohanne de Lond’
William, by the grace of God king of the Scots, to bishops, abbots, earls, barons, justices, sheriffs, officials, and all worthy men of his entire land, greeting.

Let present and future know me to have approved, and by this my charter to have made firm, the boundaries between Coldinghamshire and Bunkleshire, to be held as freely and quitly, fully and honourably, as the charter of King David my grandfather bears witness and affirms, that is from 'Midlesdene' Head by 'Mereburne' Head towards the west as far as 'Crhac Hoctrestrete', and thence by the same road as far as Eiford.

With these witnesses: Walter de Bidun, the chancellor; Earl Waldeve; Richard de Morville, the constable; Robert de Quincy; Walter of Windsor; Walter the chamberlain; Philip de Valognes; William de Vieuxpont; John of London.
